title: Contact | Chris Chope
meta_description: Latest news and campaigns from Chris Chope, the Conservative MP for Christchurch.
headings: h3: Chris Chope Conservative MP for Christchurch & East Dorset
text_excerpt: Contact | Chris Chope Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Chris News In Parliament Contact Contact Leave this field blank Constituency Office 37 Bargates, Christchurch BH23 1QD 01425 541 087 [email protected] Westminster Office House of Commons, London SW1A 0AA 0207 219 5808 [email protected] Stour & Avon Parliamentary Business Club 01425 541 087 [email protected] It would be very helpful to be able to keep you updated and interact with you about national and local activities which you may find interesting. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by Chris Chope on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy Many thanks for sharing your details, we shall be in contact again shortly. The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
